## 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS Size: Select T-Shirt Size Material: Choose Fabric Type Colors: Select T-Shirt Colors Printing: Choose Print Method Quantity: Enter Quantity Upload: Add Your Design ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB

Custom t-shirts from Shirtspot.com offer premium apparel solutions for businesses, organizations, and personal use. Our advanced printing technology ensures vibrant, long-lasting designs that maintain their quality wash after wash. Each t-shirt features professional-grade materials selected for comfort, durability, and print retention.

Our custom t-shirt printing process accommodates various design complexities, from simple text to full-color graphics. Whether you need employee uniforms, promotional merchandise, or event apparel, our t-shirts deliver professional results. The design upload system accepts multiple file formats, making it easy to transform your vision into wearable apparel.

Available in custom sizes ranging from youth to 5XL, our t-shirts accommodate diverse sizing needs. The ordering process includes bulk quantity options with volume discounts, making large orders cost-effective for businesses and organizations. Professional design assistance ensures your custom t-shirts meet exact specifications and brand requirements.

## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

Our custom t-shirts feature premium fabric options designed for durability and comfort. The standard cotton blend provides excellent printability while maintaining softness and breathability. 100% cotton options offer traditional feel and superior ink absorption for vibrant, long-lasting designs.

Performance fabrics include moisture-wicking blends ideal for athletic applications and outdoor use. These materials resist fading and maintain shape retention through multiple wash cycles. Ring-spun cotton varieties provide enhanced softness and improved print surface for detailed designs.

Eco-friendly options include organic cotton and recycled polyester blends for environmentally conscious projects. Each material undergoes quality testing to ensure consistent printing results and durability. Fabric weights range from lightweight options for layering to heavier weights for standalone wear, accommodating seasonal needs and specific applications.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

Professional t-shirt printing utilizes advanced techniques including screen printing, direct-to-garment, and heat transfer methods. Screen printing delivers vibrant colors and excellent durability for large quantity orders, while direct-to-garment provides photo-quality detail for complex designs with unlimited colors.

Heat transfer options accommodate specialized materials like reflective elements, glitter, and metallic finishes. Embroidery services add premium texture and professional appearance for corporate apparel and promotional items. Each printing method undergoes quality control to ensure consistent results across entire orders.

Finishing touches include custom tags, specialty inks, and sizing modifications. Discharge printing creates soft-hand designs that integrate seamlessly with fabric texture. Water-based inks provide eco-friendly options without compromising print quality, while plastisol inks deliver bold, opaque coverage ideal for dark fabrics.

## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

Custom t-shirt production begins immediately upon artwork approval and payment confirmation. Standard production takes 7-10 business days, with rush options available for urgent orders. Design approval typically occurs within 24 hours of order submission.

Large quantity orders may require additional production time, with specific timelines provided during the ordering process. Rush production options include 3-5 day turnaround for most designs and quantities. Production schedules account for printing method complexity and seasonal demand fluctuations.

Quality control inspections occur throughout production to ensure consistent results. Order tracking updates provide real-time production status from artwork approval through shipping preparation. Holiday seasons may extend production times, with advance notice provided for planning purposes.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

Secure payment processing accepts major credit cards, PayPal, and business purchase orders for qualified accounts. Online ordering provides immediate payment confirmation and order processing initiation. Corporate accounts receive NET 30 payment terms with approved credit applications.

Bulk order discounts automatically apply based on quantity tiers, with additional savings for repeat customers. Payment security utilizes industry-standard encryption to protect financial information throughout the transaction process.

Quote requests provide detailed pricing for large or complex orders before payment commitment. Special financing options may be available for qualifying large orders through third-party providers. All transactions include detailed invoicing for accounting and tax purposes.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Custom t-shirt shipping utilizes reliable carriers with tracking provided for all orders. Standard ground shipping delivers within 5-7 business days to most locations, with expedited options available for urgent needs. Packaging ensures garments arrive wrinkle-free and ready for immediate use.

Large quantity orders ship via freight carriers with scheduled delivery appointments. International shipping accommodates global customers with customs documentation included. Shipping costs calculate automatically during checkout based on destination and order specifications.

Order consolidation optimizes shipping efficiency for multiple item orders. Same-location delivery for large quantities includes unpacking and distribution services. Tracking information provides real-time delivery updates from shipment through final delivery confirmation.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

Custom t-shirts serve diverse applications including corporate uniforms, promotional merchandise, and event apparel. Businesses utilize branded t-shirts for employee identification, trade show marketing, and customer giveaways. The professional appearance and durability make them ideal for long-term brand representation.

Educational institutions create spirit wear, fundraising merchandise, and team uniforms using custom t-shirt printing. Sports teams and recreational leagues benefit from moisture-wicking materials and durable printing that withstands active use and frequent washing.

Special events including conferences, festivals, and celebrations use custom t-shirts for participant identification and memorable keepsakes. Non-profit organizations leverage t-shirt sales for fundraising while promoting their mission and brand awareness throughout the community.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

Custom t-shirt design upload accepts multiple file formats including AI, PSD, PDF, and high-resolution PNG files. Vector artwork provides optimal print quality and scalability across different t-shirt sizes. Minimum resolution requirements ensure sharp, professional printing results.

Color specifications include PMS matching for brand consistency and CMYK conversion for full-color designs. Design assistance services help optimize artwork for specific printing methods and fabric colors. File preparation guidelines ensure compatibility with production equipment and techniques.

Template downloads provide precise sizing guides for design creation and placement. Professional design services create custom artwork from concepts, logos, or existing materials. Artwork approval process includes digital proofs showing exact design placement and colors before production begins.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Professional custom t-shirt creation combines quality materials, advanced printing technology, and expert craftsmanship to deliver exceptional results. Our partnership with Shirtspot.com ensures access to premium apparel options with competitive pricing and reliable service. Each order receives individual attention to guarantee satisfaction and professional results.

The comprehensive customization process accommodates unique requirements while maintaining efficient production schedules. From initial design consultation through final delivery, our team provides support and expertise to ensure successful outcomes. Quality assurance protocols verify that every t-shirt meets rigorous standards for durability, appearance, and print quality before shipment.

Customers benefit from volume discounts, repeat order convenience, and dedicated account management for ongoing apparel needs. Our commitment to excellence extends beyond individual orders to long-term partnerships that support business growth and brand development through professional custom apparel solutions.

## 14) FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

What file formats do you accept for custom t-shirt designs?

We accept AI, PSD, PDF, PNG, JPG, and EPS file formats for custom t-shirt printing. Vector files (AI, EPS, PDF) provide the best print quality and scalability. High-resolution raster files should be at least 300 DPI at final print size. Our design team can assist with file optimization and format conversion if needed to ensure optimal printing results.

How long does custom t-shirt production take?

Standard production time is 7-10 business days after artwork approval and payment confirmation. Rush options are available with 3-5 day turnaround for most orders. Large quantity orders may require additional time, with specific timelines provided during ordering. Production begins immediately upon design approval, with real-time tracking updates throughout the process.

What printing methods are available for custom t-shirts?

We offer screen printing, direct-to-garment (DTG), heat transfer, and embroidery options. Screen printing works best for large quantities with limited colors, while DTG provides photo-quality detail for complex designs. Heat transfer accommodates specialty materials, and embroidery adds premium texture. Our team recommends the optimal method based on your design and quantity requirements.

Do you offer bulk pricing for large t-shirt orders?

Yes, automatic volume discounts apply based on quantity tiers, with significant savings for larger orders. Corporate accounts receive additional pricing benefits and NET 30 payment terms with approved credit. Custom quotes are available for orders over 500 pieces or specialized requirements. Repeat customers benefit from preferred pricing and expedited processing for ongoing apparel needs.

What t-shirt sizes and colors are available?

Our custom t-shirts are available in sizes from youth small through adult 5XL, with specific sizing charts provided for each garment style. Color options include over 50 standard colors, with custom color matching available for brand consistency. Premium fabric options include cotton, polyester blends, performance materials, and eco-friendly alternatives to meet diverse application requirements.

Can I see a sample before placing a large order?

Sample production is available for large orders to verify print quality, colors, and fabric selection before full production begins. Digital proofs are provided for all orders showing design placement and colors. Physical samples typically require 3-5 business days and sample costs can often be credited toward final orders. This ensures complete satisfaction before committing to large quantities.
